name: React
scope: A person with BASIC proficiency in React (1-2 years experience) can build functional React applications using functional components, JSX, and React hooks (useState, useEffect, useRef, useContext). They understand component lifecycle, manage local component state, and pass data between components via props. They can handle user events, perform basic form handling, and conditionally render UI. They fetch data from REST APIs using fetch or axios inside useEffect, handle loading and error states, and update the UI in response. They understand key-based list rendering and can create basic component hierarchies. They use React Router for client-side navigation and understand route params and nested routes. They are familiar with basic CSS-in-JS or CSS modules for component styling. They can use React DevTools for debugging, understand prop drilling, and have basic exposure to Context API. They follow standard project structure, use create-react-app or Vite for scaffolding, and manage dependencies with npm or yarn. They write simple component tests using React Testing Library. They are comfortable implementing straightforward features under guidance and can participate in code reviews for basic component logic.
